title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: Find My Device does not prompt for location permission after it is revoked via Android Settings
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, accepting the Location permission when prompted.
2. Navigate to Android Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions and revoke the Location permission.
3. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or locate the Find My Device feature on the Home screen.
expected: The app should detect that Location permission is revoked and display an appropriate prompt/message asking the user to grant Location permission. The user should be able to re-enable Location permission from the prompt to use Find My Device.
